Explicit Interface Implementations

ConfigurationKeyword

The configuration keyword for the new FeatureClass.

virtual string ConfigurationKeyword { set; }

Returns

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Remarks

<p>Configuration keywords can be of two types:</p> <ul> <li>esriConfigurationKeywordGeneral, which references storage parameters for creating feature classes and tables</li> <li>esriConfigurationKeywordNetwork, which references storage parameters for creating geometric networks or network datasets</li> <li>esriConfigurationKeywordTopology, which references storage parameters for creating topologies</li> </ul> <p>An enumeration of <strong>ConfigurationKeyword</strong> objects for an ArcSDE or File geodatabase workspace is returned by the <strong>IWorkspaceConfiguration</strong> interface.</p>

Convert()

Convert the input FeatureClass to another FeatureClass in the output FeatureDataset.

virtual IEnumInvalidObject Convert()

Returns

IEnumInvalidObject
